headline: Transcript: Canal+’s blockbuster London listing
summary: Mischa Frankl-Duval talks to Daniel Thomas
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Canal+’s blockbuster London listing’

Mischa Frankl-Duval Good morning from the Financial Times. Today is Thursday, November 28th. And this is your FT News Briefing.

European Central Bank head Christine Lagarde calls for negotiation over tariffs. Canal+ prepares for a big London stock listing. And the former head of MI6 talks US-UK relations. Plus, the Kenyan government cancels major infrastructure deals led by the Adani group following bribery charges. I’m Mischa Frankl-Duval and here’s the news you need to start your day.

[MUSIC PLAYING]The president of the European Central Bank, Christine Lagarde, has urged Europe’s leaders to work with Donald Trump over trade. Trump has threatened tariffs of up to 20 per cent on all non-Chinese imports to the US. In an interview with the FT, Lagarde said the EU needed not to retaliate but negotiate with Trump, and warns that a trade war could hit global GDP. Officials in Brusse
